title: Add PushUrgency enum for ChatPushConfig fields
description: ChatPushConfig.urgency, ChatPushConfig.mention_urgency, and ChatPushCapability.supported_urgency_values are all String/Vec<String>. The spec (via RFC 8030) defines urgency values: 'very-low', 'low', 'normal', 'high'. An enum PushUrgency { VeryLow, Low, Normal, High, Unknown(String) } would give compile-time safety at these fields.
notes: Part of epic jmap-chat-tui-hqb: jmap-chat wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
